infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to show your city on the global participation map.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: World Choir needs calendar access to add World Choir 2027 to your calendar when you tap Add to Calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: World Choir needs calendar access to add World Choir 2027 to your calendar when you tap Add to Calendar.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: World Choir needs access to Reminders to create a reminder when you tap Remind Me.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: World Choir needs access to Reminders to create a reminder when you tap Remind Me.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow World Choir to use your location to show your city on the global map.
